prompt: A dreamy painterly anime-style full-body illustration of a young woman standing just outside a sunlit cafe entrance, with strong attention to the direction of her face and gaze. She is turned slightly to the right side of the image, her head angled sideways as if looking off-camera toward the street. Her face is softly simplified and partially obscured by bright light, with delicate features and no harsh outlines. She has long wavy brown hair with warm golden highlights, loose strands catching the sunlight, and a small hair clip near one side. She wears a loose cream-beige long-sleeved romper or short dress with a gathered waist and soft flowing sleeves, white scrunched socks, chunky white sneakers, and a small white shoulder bag with a thin gold chain strap. She holds 1 clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a black straw in both hands at chest height. The setting is the exterior of a cozy cafe with tall glass doors and windows on the right, and 2 visible cafe signs that read “MOUNT TOKYO” with smaller text “COFFEE, SANDWICH and more...” — 1 wall-mounted rectangular sign and 1 black A-frame sidewalk sign near the lower left; the A-frame also includes small opening hours text near the bottom. Include 1 simple wooden bench along the left edge. The whole scene is filled with dappled sunlight and dense leaf shadows cast across the walls, glass, ground, bench, and the woman’s clothing, creating a shimmering summer atmosphere. Use a soft watercolor and gouache-like rendering style with luminous overexposed highlights, warm cream, gold, and peach tones mixed with cool blue shadow accents, textured brushwork, reflective glass, and a nostalgic airy mood. Vertical composition, full body visible from head to shoes, elegant fashion illustration framing, highly detailed environment, sun-washed cafe street scene in Japan.
translatedPrompt: 一幅梦幻般的绘画风格动漫全身插画，描绘了一位年轻女性站在阳光明媚的咖啡馆入口外，画面着重表现了她面部朝向和视线的细节。她身体略微转向画面右侧，头部侧倾，仿佛正看向镜头外的街道。她的面部线条柔和简约，部分被明亮的光线遮蔽，五官精致，没有生硬的轮廓线。她留着一头带有温暖金色挑染的棕色长卷发，零散的发丝捕捉着阳光，一侧别着一个小发夹。她穿着一件宽松的米色长袖连体裤或短裙，腰部收紧，袖口轻盈飘逸，搭配白色堆堆袜、厚底小白鞋，以及一个带有细金链条的小白肩包。她双手捧着一杯插着黑色吸管的透明塑料冰咖啡，置于胸前。场景位于一家舒适的咖啡馆外，右侧是高大的玻璃门窗，可以看到两个写有“MOUNT TOKYO”字样的咖啡馆招牌，下方附有较小的文字“COFFEE, SANDWICH and more...”——其中一个是墙面安装的长方形招牌，另一个是左下方的黑色 A 型人行道立牌；A 型立牌底部还包含小字营业时间。左侧边缘放置着 1 张简单的木制长椅。整个场景充满了斑驳的阳光和浓密的树影，投射在墙壁、玻璃、地面、长椅和女性的衣物上，营造出闪烁的夏日氛围。采用柔和的水彩和水粉渲染风格，带有明亮过曝的高光，温暖的奶油色、金色和桃色调与冷蓝色的阴影相得益彰，笔触充满质感，玻璃反射出光泽，呈现出怀旧而轻盈的氛围。竖构图，全身可见，优雅的时尚插画构图，环境细节丰富，日本阳光洗礼下的咖啡馆街景。

breakdown.creativeCore: 阳光下的咖啡馆动漫少女：此提示词可生成温暖、具有绘画感的动漫风格全身咖啡馆街头肖像，非常适合生活方式插画、氛围艺术或以角色为中心的社交媒体视觉内容。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
